makecode_ts.source:
radio.onReceivedNumber(function (receivedNumber) {
    if (receivedNumber == 17) {
        basic.showLeds(`
            . . . . .
            . # . # .
            . . . . .
            # . . . #
            . # # # .
            `)
    } else if (receivedNumber == 23) {
        basic.showLeds(`
            . . . . .
            . # . # .
            . . . . .
            . # # # .
            # . . . #
            `)
    } else {
        basic.showLeds(`
            . # . # .
            . . . . .
            . . # . .
            . # . # .
            . . # . .
            `)
    }
    basic.pause(2000)
    basic.clearScreen()
})
input.onButtonPressed(Button.A, function () {
    basic.showLeds(`
        . . . . .
        . # . # .
        . . . . .
        # . . . #
        . # # # .
        `)
    radio.sendNumber(17)
    basic.clearScreen()
})
input.onButtonPressed(Button.AB, function () {
    basic.showLeds(`
        . # . # .
        . . . . .
        . . # . .
        . # . # .
        . . # . .
        `)
    radio.sendNumber(42)
    basic.clearScreen()
})
input.onButtonPressed(Button.B, function () {
    basic.showLeds(`
        . . . . .
        . # . # .
        . . . . .
        . # # # .
        # . . . #
        `)
    radio.sendNumber(23)
    basic.clearScreen()
})
radio.setGroup(3)

micropython.source:
from microbit import *
import radio

# The Python version of this project has sleep()
# for each button press to make the A+B button work better

radio.config(group=3)
radio.on()

while True:
    if button_a.is_pressed() and button_b.is_pressed():
        display.show(Image.SURPRISED)
        radio.send('42')
        sleep(300)
        display.clear()        
    elif button_a.is_pressed():
        display.show(Image.HAPPY)        
        radio.send('17')
        sleep(300)
        display.clear()
    elif button_b.is_pressed():
        display.show(Image.SAD)
        radio.send('23')
        sleep(300)
        display.clear()
        
    message = radio.receive()
    if message:
        if message == '17':
            display.show(Image.HAPPY)  
        elif message == '23':
            display.show(Image.SAD)
        else:
            display.show(Image.SURPRISED)
        sleep(2000)
    display.clear()
    sleep(200)
